name: Sally Lunn for ABM
recipeIngredient: enough warm water to equal 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into the bread pan in the order listed (or reverse the order if your machine calls for dry ingredients first).
2. Select Basic White Bread cycle (or equivalent) and choose light or medium crust.
3. Press start.
4. Use of a delay timer is not recommended due to use of perishable ingredients.
5. Makes a 1 1/2 pound loaf.
